inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total value of all owned assets (home, cars, investments, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of all owned assets (home, cars, investments, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sahip olunan tüm varlıkların toplam değeri (ev, araba, yatırımlar vb.)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwert aller eigenen Vermögenswerte (Haus, Autos, Investitionen usw.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale de tous les actifs possédés (maison, voitures, investissements, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total de todos los activos propios (casa, autos, inversiones, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الإجمالية لجميع الأصول المملوكة (منزل، سيارات، استثمارات، إلخ)

inputs.label: Underlying Liability Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Combined liability limits from auto, home, and other primary insurance policies

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined liability limits from auto, home, and other primary insurance policies
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oto, konut ve diğer birincil sigorta poliçelerinden birleşik sorumluluk limitleri
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierte Haftpflichtgrenzen aus Kfz-, Hausrat- und anderen Erstversicherungspolicen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limites de responsabilité combinées des polices d'assurance auto, habitation et autres polices principales
businessContext_i18n.es: Límites de responsabilidad combinados de pólizas de seguro primarias (auto, hogar y otras)
businessContext_i18n.ar: حدود المسؤولية المجمعة من وثائق التأمين على السيارة والمنزل وغيرها من وثائق التأمين الأولية

inputs.label: Risk Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier based on occupation, lifestyle, and property risks (100% = standard)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier based on occupation, lifestyle, and property risks (100% = standard)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Meslek, yaşam tarzı ve mülk risklerine dayalı çarpan (%100 = standart)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator basierend auf Beruf, Lebensstil und Sachrisiken (100 % = Standard)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur basé sur la profession, le mode de vie et les risques immobiliers (100 % = standard)
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador basado en la ocupación, estilo de vida y riesgos de propiedad (100% = estándar)
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف يعتمد على مخاطر المهنة ونمط الحياة والممتلكات (100% = المستوى القياسي)
